panels.description: Helps to identify service "up" anomalies during the reporting period.  (e.g. a change in running copies)
panels.title: Service Uptime Status

panels.description: The largest number of partitions in a node.

result.text: Partition count is high. More nodes are required soon.
IMPORTANT: Partition count is very high. Add more nodes.
WARNING: Partition count is extremely high. Add more nodes immediately.

links.title: Check details at Dashboard 6: Services Health

panels.title: Database Partitions Per Node

panels.description: Ratio of Average number of objects per partition vs max number of objects in any ONE partitions

links.title: Check details at Dashboard 5: System Capacity

panels.title: Metadata Space Used / Available

result.text: Unavailable - Check Management API section for Storage Components in Object Storage Management UI

links.title: Check details at Dashboard 6: System Capacity

panels.description: The undeleted objects backlog is high (over 1 Billion objects). Check Dashboard 6 - Data Lifecycle - DELETE_BACKEND_OBJECTS policy. Read HCP for Cloud Scale Administrator Guide for more details.

result.text: Unavailable - Check Management API section for Storage Components in Object Storage Management UI
Very high delete backlog (>1 billion objects and parts). For more information, see the description for this panel in Administration Guide.
Delete backlog is over 100 million objects and parts. For more information, see the description for this panel in Administration Guide.

targets.expr: (sum(storage_total_objects{store="aggregate"}) - sum(metadata_clientobject_part_active_count)) * (count(sum(lifecycle_policy_rekey_initiated_count_total OR on() vector(0)) ==0) + (count(sum(lifecycle_policy_rekey_initiated_count_total) > 1) OR on() vector(0)) )

panels.title: Undeleted objects backlog

panels.description: Checks if you should consider Bucket Expiration Lifecycle policy.

result.text: Consider setting Bucket Expiration Lifecycle policy

links.title: Check the list of buckets for Expiration policy consideration on Dashboard 4: Buckets stats and activity

panels.title: Bucket Expiration Lifecycle Considerations

panels.description:
This panel shows the DB partitions protection level: Healthy, Degraded, Unprotected (Failures Detected),  and Overprotected. 
Read HCP for Cloud Scale Administrator Guide for more details.

links.title: Check details at Dashboard 6: Services Health

targets.expr: ((count(count(mcs_copies_per_partition==1) > 0) OR on() vector(0)) * 1000) + ((count(count(mcs_copies_per_partition==2) > 0) OR on() vector(0)) * 100) + ((count(count(mcs_copies_per_partition==3) > 0) OR on() vector(0)) * 1) + ((count(count(mcs_copies_per_partition==0) > 0) OR on() vector(0)) * 2) + ((count(count(mcs_copies_per_partition==4) > 0) OR on() vector(0)) * 10)

panels.title: Database Partitions Protection

links.title: Check details at Dashboard 5: System Capacity
Check details at Dashboard 5: System Capacity

panels.description: Displays the percentage of encrypted Objects, system wide
panels.title: Encrypted Objects

panels.description: Checks whether DLS (Data-Lifecycle Service) is examining objects for DELETE_BACKEND_OBJECTS policy. UNHEALTHY indicates that no activity was detected in the last 24 hours.
panels.title: DLS: Delete Backend Objects policy

panels.description: Checks whether DLS (Data-Lifecycle Service) is examining objects for VERSION_EXPIRATION policy. UNHEALTHY indicates that no activity was detected in the last 24 hours.
panels.title: DLS: Version Expiration policy

panels.description: Checks whether DLS (Data-Lifecycle Service) is examining objects for TOMBSTONE_DELETION policy
panels.title: DLS: Tombstone Delete policy

panels.description: Checks whether DLS (Data-Lifecycle Service) is examining objects for INCOMPLETE_MPU_EXPIRATION policy
panels.title: DLS: Incomplete MPU expiration policy

panels.description: Checks whether DLS (Data-Lifecycle Service) is examining objects for CHARGEBACK_POPULATION policy
panels.title: DLS: Chargeback policy

panels.description: Checks the Health of the EXTERNAL KMS (Key Management Server) - e.g all are online
panels.title: External KMS Health

panels.description: S3 I/O should be distributed evenly among nodes. Any value >15% imbalance should be investigated.

targets.expr: 100* abs ((max ( sum by (instance) (http_s3_servlet_operations_total{job="S3-Gateway"})) - min ( sum by (instance) (http_s3_servlet_operations_total{job="S3-Gateway"}))) / avg ( sum by (instance) (http_s3_servlet_operations_total{job="S3-Gateway"})))

panels.title: S3 I/O Balance

panels.description: A Database should be distributed evenly among nodes. Any node showing >15% imbalance should be investigated.
panels.title: Metadata Partition Balance

panels.description: Indicate if any database instance has entered error mode, resulting in a loss of availability. Contact Hitachi support if this panel displays anything other than "Normal".
panels.title: Metadata Error Mode Status

panels.description: Checks whether DLS (Data-Lifecycle Service) is examining objects for REKEY policy. UNHEALTHY indicates that no activity was detected in the last 24 hours.
panels.title: DLS: Rekey policy
